headline: Leidos (LDOS) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Thomas Bell: Thank you, Stuart, and good morning, everyone.  Today, I am pleased to report a very strong start for Leidos in 2026.  As a result of this strong core performance and the immediately accretive nature of our Entrust acquisition, we are raising our 2026 guidance for revenue by $500 million, non-GAAP diluted EPS by $0.05 and operating cash flow by $50 million.

raw.headline: Leidos (LDOS) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript

headline: Leidos (NYSE:LDOS) Surprises With Q1 CY2026 Sales
summary: Defense contractor Leidos (NYSE:LDOS) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 3.7% year on year to $4.4 billion. The company expects the full year’s revenue to be around $18.2 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $3.13 per share was 7.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
